payload.topic: Bing Webmaster Tools Operations and IndexNow Implementation
payload.target_audience: SEO team focusing on Bing/Microsoft search
payload.prompt_override: Create a COMPREHENSIVE Bing Webmaster Tools Operations Playbook. Include: 1) Weekly Bing WMT routine (Search Performance, Crawl Information, Diagnostics), 2) Bing-specific optimization tactics: IndexNow protocol implementation, Bing Places, social signals, Bing Chat/Copilot optimization, 3) Bing SEO Analyzer monthly run, 4) Bing vs Google performance comparison tracking, 5) IndexNow setup guide (generate key, upload to site, API integration), 6) Bing-specific ranking factors that differ from Google. Context: Bing powers 25-35% of B2B enterprise search through Edge, Cortana, Teams, and Microsoft 365.
